concerns.text: Constitution VII (Psychometric Validity of Agency Measures) requires that the linguistic markers used to infer perceived agency be validated against an established psychological scale. The specification’s Functional Requirements list ends at FR-008 and does not include a requirement that implements this validation step (e.g., a requirement to run correlation/reliability analysis and store the validated feature set). Add a functional requirement (e.g., FR-009) that mandates the psychometric validation procedure and its documentation.
